title: Sclerophyllum pulchrum

It is native to South Africa and is often found in well-drained areas. The classification of Sclerophyllum pulchrum is as follows: kingdom Plantae, clade Angiosperms, clade Eudicots, clade Asterids, order Asterales, family Asteraceae, genus Sclerophyllum, species S. pulchrum.
